name: Irish Potato Pie
recipeIngredient: 3 cups cooked potatoes, peeled and diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
2. Generously butter a 9-inch pie dish.
3. Whisk together eggs, onions, salt, and pepper in a large bowl.
4. Add potatoes, cheese, ham, bell pepper, and half and half to the mixture. Stir until well blended.
5. Pour the mixture into the prepared pie dish.
6. Bake for about 1 hour and 20 minutes, or until set.
7. Cut into wedges.
